business_definition: Represents an issued insurance contract between an insurer and a policyholder.
remarks: Root aggregate of the Policy domain.

business_definition: Represents the customer legally owning the policy.
Represents the insured vehicle associated with the policy.
Represents the declared or insured driver associated with the policy.
Represents canonical coverages purchased under the issued policy.
Represents financial information and premium calculations for the policy.
Represents modifications applied to an issued policy after issuance.
Represents renewal transactions associated with the policy.
Represents operational lifecycle and governance of the issued policy.

entity_type: explainability and operational intelligence associated with the policy.
